name: lamina
description: UX research and design knowledge for coding agents
author: Aryan Iyappan

scripts.test: node scripts/verify_lamina_bundle.mjs --check structure && node tests/check_lamina_init_test.mjs && node examples/minimal-blueprint/validate-test.mjs
scripts.test:eval:spec: npm run sync:commands && node evals/hooks/validate-plugin.mjs && node evals/hooks/validate-skills-strict.mjs
scripts.test:eval:smoke: node evals/scripts/merge-evals.mjs && agent-skill-eval run --skill ./skills/lamina --evals ./evals/smoke/evals.json --agent claude-code --agent codex --agent opencode --runs 1 --pre-run-command 'bash evals/hooks/pre-run-eval.sh' --post-grade-command 'node evals/hooks/grade-lamina.mjs'
scripts.test:eval:full: node evals/scripts/merge-evals.mjs && agent-skill-eval run --skill ./skills/lamina --evals ./evals/lamina/evals.json --agent claude-code --agent codex --agent opencode --runs 3 --baseline --pre-run-command 'bash evals/hooks/pre-run-eval.sh' --post-grade-command 'node evals/hooks/grade-lamina.mjs'
scripts.test:eval:redteam: node evals/promptfoo/build-skill-context.mjs && npx promptfoo eval -c evals/promptfoo/lamina-redteam.yaml
